def eligible_for_financial_scholarship(self) -> bool:
        if self.is_valid_input():
            if (self.age <= 30 and self.GPA >= 3.5) or (self.age > 30 and self.GPA == 4.0):
                return True
        return False

    def is_valid_input(self) -> bool:
        if (self.gender.lower() in [gender.value.lower() for gender in Gender]) and \
           (self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]) and \
           (self.race.lower() in [race.value.lower() for race in Race]) and \
           (self.employment_status.lower() in [status.value.lower() for status in EmploymentStatus]) and \
           (self.education.lower() in [edu.value.lower() for edu in Education]) and \
           (self.marital_status.lower() in [status.value.lower() for status in MaritalStatus]) and \
           (self.religion.lower() in [religion.value.lower() for religion in Religion]) and \
           (self.GPA in [3.5, 4.0]) and \
           (self.financial_need.lower() in [need.value.lower() for need in FinancialNeed]):
            return True
        else:
            return False
